'''machafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zaitech|zaitech]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ch-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zaitech|zaitech]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| machafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæchæfæth|mæchæfæth]] || [[word:mæchæfæj|mæchæfæj]] || [[word:mæchæfæsh|mæchæfæsh]] || [[word:mæchæfæ|mæchæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:machachafath|machachafath]] || [[word:machachafaj|machachafaj]] || [[word:machachafash|machachafash]] || [[word:machachafa|machachafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:machafath|machafath]] || [[word:machafaj|machafaj]] || [[word:machafash|machafash]] || [[word:machafa|machafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:machaffath|machaffath]] || [[word:machaffaj|machaffaj]] || [[word:machaffash|machaffash]] || [[word:machaffaf|machaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:machafatha|machafatha]] || [[word:machafaja|machafaja]] || [[word:machafasha|machafasha]] || [[word:machafaka|machafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:machafath|machafath]] || [[word:machafaj|machafaj]] || [[word:machafash|machafash]] || [[word:machafa|machafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:machafathal|machafathal]] || [[word:machafajal|machafajal]] || [[word:machafashal|machafashal]] || [[word:machafakal|machafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:machafathatha|machafathatha]] || [[word:machafajaja|machafajaja]] || [[word:machafashasha|machafashasha]] || [[word:machafaka|machafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:machafathan|machafathan]] || [[word:machafajan|machafajan]] || [[word:machafashan|machafashan]] || [[word:machafakan|machafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:machafathaoro|machafathaoro]] || [[word:machafajaoro|machafajaoro]] || [[word:machafashaoro|machafashaoro]] || [[word:machafakaoro|machafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
